page_metadata.biotools__summary: It includes the miRNAs of two model plants, Arabidopsis (Arabidopsis thaliana) and rice (Oryza sativa). Four major functional modules, "SNPs", "Pri-miRNAs", "MiR—Tar", and "Self-reg", are provided.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: It includes the miRNAs of two model plants, Arabidopsis (Arabidopsis thaliana) and rice (Oryza sativa). Four major functional modules, "SNPs", "Pri-miRNAs", "MiR—Tar", and "Self-reg", are provided.
